summary: A heavily redacted field report describes a nighttime aerial search near a mountain range in 2025, during which a helicopter crew and observers on the ground reported multiple sightings of orb-like lights that flared up and down in formation, sometimes appearing near the aircraft and near unspecified military aircraft conducting a training mission. Witnesses described the objects as oval, orange with white/yellow centers, moving at high speed, and at times splitting into multiple objects before being lost from view.
